title: phyllanthus rouxii
intro: Phyllanthus rouxii, also known as Phyllanthus niruri or Chanca piedra, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to help dissolve kidney stones by preventing their reformation. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus rouxii include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve liver function, and aid in weight loss. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and urinary tract problems.
